cases.publicSummary: A controlled reconstruction covering sequence definition, material handling, sensor logic, guarding questions, installation gates, and measurable production criteria without employer, vendor, part, or plant identifiers.
cases.boundary: Reconstruction only; no proprietary source drawings, programs, production values, vendor identity, or safety certification.
unresolvedQuestions: Locate independent source records and confirm dates before upgrading the classification.

cases.publicSummary: A public-safe reconstruction of part presentation, gripper and chuck interface questions, machine signals, probing, exception handling, queue control, and decision criteria.
cases.boundary: No machine serials, proprietary programs, part identities, videos, cycle data, or vendor-specific controls are published.
unresolvedQuestions: Confirm the exact machine model and source chronology privately before upgrading the classification.

cases.publicSummary: A future reconstruction of bar utilization, remnant, cutoff, cycle, capacity, handling, and exception decisions using synthetic values only.
cases.boundary: Do not publish production quantities, part numbers, programs, machine identity, or employer data.
unresolvedQuestions: Locate corroborating messages, setup records, programs, photos, or proposals.

cases.publicSummary: Long-term experience implementing CNC programming standards, CAD/CAM workflows, posts, tool libraries, feeds and speeds, troubleshooting, quoting, and repeatable output controls.
cases.boundary: Public wording remains non-quantified until program-count and output claims are independently corroborated.
unresolvedQuestions: Do not publish a 25,000-plus program count unless a defensible count and methodology are documented.

cases.internalTitle: CADKEY, CKD, KeyCreator, Kubotek, Mastercam, macros and API work
cases.publicSummary: A future public-safe summary of CAD/CAM migration, reusable geometry, post controls, macros, and repeatable file handling.
cases.boundary: Software names may be stated only as personal experience; proprietary files, licenses, macros, posts, and employer data remain private.
unresolvedQuestions: Separate personal skill evidence from employer-owned files and confirm software/version chronology.

cases.publicSummary: A future anonymized account of introducing and standardizing CNC, programming, quoting, and automation practices in a long-running manufacturing environment.
cases.boundary: No former-employer name, customer, employee, drawing, price, program, production, plant, or vendor detail may be published from private evidence.
unresolvedQuestions: Corroborate dates and scope with public-safe records; obtain legal/privacy review before any named historical claim.

cases.publicSummary: A future reconstruction connecting vision inspection questions, material storage, staging, access, and practical workflow improvements.
cases.boundary: No proprietary images, inspection criteria, plant layout, or safety claims.
unresolvedQuestions: Locate public-safe source chronology and separate distinct projects.

cases.publicSummary: Potential case study focused on scope, sequencing, material decisions, unknowns, and owner checkpoints.
cases.boundary: Location, address, owner, contractor, family, permit, utility, and photo metadata remain private.
unresolvedQuestions: Identify owner-authorized photos and records; remove location and family information.

cases.publicSummary: Potential case study covering phased remodeling, materials, access, owner decisions, and construction sequence.
cases.boundary: No address, family, customer, contractor, property record, or identifiable exterior view without written approval.
unresolvedQuestions: Confirm ownership/permission and classify every image before public use.

cases.publicSummary: A public-safe planning example covering use zones, fixed constraints, measurements, material decisions, and the order in which owner choices should be resolved.
cases.boundary: Demonstration structure only; not a permit, code, electrical, plumbing, or construction drawing.

cases.publicSummary: A 28-by-40-foot garage example showing protected vehicle lanes, workbench and tool zones, fixed-obstacle checks, missing measurements, and phased setup actions.
cases.boundary: Hypothetical demonstration; not customer work, permit drawings, engineering, or field-verified dimensions.

cases.publicSummary: A seven-status owner-controlled workflow connecting intake, missing information, quote review, scheduling, completion, and follow-up without automatic customer sends.
cases.boundary: Synthetic records only; no real customer or communication data.
